data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for bulk distribution to employee groups.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Bulk distribution to employee groups' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of bulk distribution features. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature, but without any supporting evidence or endpoints to confirm its existence, the requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: No evidence of bulk distribution functionality for employee groups.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
